description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test_base, test, and deploy. In the test stage add a test job named test that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/costrouc/dftfit/base:patch_11May2018 and runs "python -m pip install numpy cython mpi4py", "python -m pip install .", and "python setup.py test --addopts '-m \"not benchmark\"'"; also add a test_benchmark job with the same image that runs the same install commands and then "python setup.py test --addopts '-m \"benchmark\"'". In the test_base stage add a deploy_docker_dftfit_base job using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, triggered only on tags matching /^dftfit_base_[A-Za-z]+_\d+[A-Za-z]+\d+$/; it exports PKG_VERSION from the tag, sets GITLAB_IMAGE="$CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH/base", logs into the GitLab registry, builds a Docker image from Dockerfile.base with build‑arg VERSION=$PKG_VERSION, tags it as $GITLAB_IMAGE:$PKG_VERSION and pushes it. In the deploy stage add a deploy_conda job using continuumio/miniconda3:latest, triggered only on version tags matching /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+([abc]\d*)?$/; it installs conda‑build and anaconda‑client, then runs "conda build --channel=costrouc --channel=matsci --channel=conda-forge --user $ANACONDA_USERNAME --token $ANACONDA_TOKEN .conda/dftfit". Also add a deploy_docker job using docker:git with docker:dind, same tag trigger, that exports DOCKER_IMAGE="costrouc/dftfit" and GITLAB_IMAGE="$CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH/dftfit", logs into Docker Hub and GitLab, builds the image from Dockerfile.dftfit with build‑arg VERSION=$CI_COMMIT_TAG, tags it for both registries, and pushes both images. Finally add a deploy_pypi job using the base image, same tag trigger, that installs twine, setuptools, numpy, cython, mpi4py, builds source and wheel with "python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel", and uploads the distribution to PyPI with "twine upload dist/*" using the secure variables ANACONDA_USERNAME, ANACONDA_TOKEN, DOCKER_USERNAME, DOCKER_PASSWORD, TWINE_USERNAME, TWINE_PASSWORD, and TWINE_REPOSITORY_URL.
